calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (in person):
Matthew W. Walding, Esq., for Lisa Olsen, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges the recently filed Petition and confirms with counsel that a hearing on the preceding is set for Aug-10-2026. Therefore, the Status Hearing is taken off calendar. The Order to Show Cause re: failure to appear at the last calling is discussed. The preceding is taken off calendar. The court will not issue sanctions for failure to appear.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Continued To Apr-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

The Court continued the matter to April 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court ordered that an Order to Appear issue to both the administrator Lisa Olsen and their attorney Matthew W. Walding. The Court further ordered that an Order to Show Cause re: Sanctions in the amount of $250 issue to counsel for failure to appear.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
